title: Compostable Flesh
body: ![Presentation image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q5q700hg/images/6cf3f45adfb2f2a4f283636eb9abf85133b99e63.png) # Compostable Flesh Compostable Flesh is a simple mod that aims to make the **rotten flesh** dropped by zombies a bit **more useful** for agriculture. ## Features **Player composting :** - Players are now able to compost rotten flesh. - The odds of the item successfully composting are 65%, which is on par with most vanilla [items](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Composter#Composting). **Farmer Villagers :** - Farmer Villagers will pick up and compost rotten flesh like any compostable items. ## Gallery ![Farmer composting rotten flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q5q700hg/images/01060b5d13e51d623464d79a6b84309e99eaa8ec.gif) _Farmer villager compositing a stack of rotten flesh_ _A Player composting rotten flesh_
